scope.goal: keep config provider compatibility while routing Go canonical provider handoff through adapters truth source

implemented: added Provider.ToAdapterProvider and APIChannel.AdapterProvider in config
reused adapters.ProviderFromString as the only Go canonical provider normalization rule
extended DetectConflicts to surface unsupported API channel providers early

notes: packages/core execution and enforcement layers remain unchanged
config public provider literals remain anthropic/openai/google/custom for compatibility
